description: Show Snyk results in HTML tree view sent from Language Server

lastSession.nextStep: 2.1 LSP wire-up — write smoke test T-S-001 first

scenarios.name: TreeViewSmokeTest.snykTreeViewNotificationUpdatesBrowser
scenarios.description: Drive SnykExtendedLanguageClient with a real $/snyk.treeView payload; assert the SWT Browser text equals the payload's treeViewHtml.

scenarios.name: Regression: $/snyk.scan still populates legacy TreeViewer
scenarios.description: Existing scan-result flow must remain intact while HTML tree is added.

scenarios.name: SnykExtendedLanguageClient_TreeViewTest.handlerInvokesToolViewOnUiThread
scenarios.description: Mock ISnykToolView; verify handler unpacks TreeViewParams and calls toolView.updateTreeViewHtml on SWT thread.

scenarios.name: TreeViewBridgeTest.navigateToRangeReachesCommandHandler
scenarios.description: Fixture HTML calls window.__ideExecuteCommand__('snyk.navigateToRange', [...]); CommandHandler.executeCommand invoked with correct args.

scenarios.name: TreeViewBridgeTest.setNodeExpandedBatchPayloadShape
scenarios.description: Batch expand args [[id1,true],[id2,false]] dispatched as JSON-correct workspace/executeCommand call.

scenarios.name: TreeViewSelectionSyncTest.editorSelectionInvokesSelectTreeNode
scenarios.description: When editor selection changes to a Snyk-marked range, browser.evaluate calls window.__selectTreeNode__('issueId').

scenarios.name: EclipseThemeCssProviderTest.emitsAllVscodeVariables
scenarios.description: Given mocked Display color provider, generated CSS includes --vscode-foreground, --vscode-sideBar-background, etc.

scenarios.name: TreeViewBrowserHandlerTest.setHtmlInjectsThemeCss
scenarios.description: setHtml(html) prefixes the payload with the theme <style> block; setHtml(null) is a no-op.

scenarios.name: TreeViewBrowserHandlerTest.selectNodeEscapesIssueIdForJs
scenarios.description: selectNode handles single-quote and backslash in issueId without breaking JS literal.

scenarios.name: TreeViewBrowserHandlerTest.setHtmlOnDisposedBrowserIsNoOp
scenarios.description: If browser.isDisposed() is true, setHtml does nothing and does not throw.
